user_query: What did the system John created help the charitable foundation with?

selected_nodes.text: John was inspired by the foundation's passion for helping children and used his coding skills to contribute and challenge himself.

selected_nodes.text: This experience gave John a clearer sense of purpose and motivated him to potentially pursue a career in the non-profit sector.
